__warnings.note: 'Conheça-se' chosen as canonical translation. Confirm against the course series brand.
'+ Comprar outro curso de Conheça-se' — confirm phrasing matches the brand.
'Text AI' kept untranslated as it's a tier name; consider 'IA por texto'.
'A Cena' chosen for Hook (vs 'Gancho' used in methodology body). Native review: phase labels should match the methodology vocabulary.
'TSIKA' verbatim — Shona term for cultural context.
'Famba zvakanaka →' kept verbatim — Shona send-off (like 'go well').
